observations.note: XML phase output tags upgraded to nested structure with production instructions following Anthropic chain-complex-prompts pattern
Code block consolidation reduced ideate.md from 15 to 7-10 blocks while preserving all AskUserQuestion branch points and orchestration logic
Comprehensive test coverage with 21+ assertions across 3 test scripts verifying XML structure, code block consolidation, and preservation of interactive logic
Naming convention consistency maintained: all nested XML elements use hyphenated convention (e.g., problem-statement, functional-requirements) aligning with project standards

Conservative refactoring approach demonstrated: merged only safe code blocks (Phase 2.0: 4→1, Phase 2.1: 3→1) while avoiding merges that would collapse user interaction gates (Phase 0 brainstorm logic preserved)
Documentation comment in phase output tags could reference Anthropic chain-complex-prompts pattern for future maintainability, though current documentation-only marker is adequate
Monitor line count growth in SKILL.md for future enhancements; if phase outputs expand further, consider delegating schema to separate reference file to maintain ~500 line budget
No security vulnerabilities detected: no hardcoded secrets, SQL injection risks, authentication bypasses, or sensitive configuration exposure
Production instructions before phase output tags improve clarity and prepare for potential LLM-based parsing while maintaining documentation-only semantics
Skill and command remain cleanly separated: command orchestration improved through consolidation without violating single-responsibility principle

next_steps: Run /qa STORY-454 light to validate test execution
Verify story notes document downstream consumption findings (AC#3)
Proceed to release workflow if QA passes
